input.headline: Are you stuck in ordinary - but devastating - narcissism? There is a way out

raw.headline: Are you stuck in ordinary - but devastating - narcissism? There is a way out

winner: A man walks into a therapist's office and says, "Doc, I think I might be stuck in ordinary-but-devastating narcissism." The therapist nods sympathetically and asks, "So, can you tell me more about your day?" The man replies, "Well, today I saved a kitten from a tree... but I couldn't help thinking about how much attention it was getting compared to me.

candidates.text: Why don't self-centered individuals ever get lost? Because even in a maze, they always find their way back to themselves!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific to the topic of narcissism. It uses a clever wordplay on 'find their way back to themselves,' which ties directly to the theme of self-centeredness."}

candidates.text: A man walks into a therapist's office and says, "Doc, I think I might be stuck in ordinary-but-devastating narcissism." The therapist nods sympathetically and asks, "So, can you tell me more about your day?" The man replies, "Well, today I saved a kitten from a tree... but I couldn't help thinking about how much attention it was getting compared to me.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific, and includes a surprising twist with the kitten scenario. It ties back to the headline's theme of narcissism but could be more clearly connected for maximum impact."}

candidates.text: At least with ordinary narcissism, you don't have to worry about being overwhelmed by grandiose fantasies... of being extraordinary.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on narcissism, concise and specific with clever wordplay."}

candidates.text: Why was the mirror feeling so down? Because it got stuck in everyday shatterism.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke attempts wordplay with 'shatterism' as a play on 'narcissism,' but the connection to the headline is weak and the humor feels forced. The pun is somewhat creative but lacks clarity and impact."}

candidates.text: Why did the selfie-obsessed octopus join a support group? Because he wanted to break free from his own "inked-ness"!
